title: Klagenfurt、Carinthia — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Klagenfurt、Carinthiaの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

KlagenfurtはCarinthiaにある人口102,618の都市です。The sunny capital of Carinthia, set on the shores of Lake Wörthersee, known for its Mediterranean flair, the Minimundus miniature park, and outdoor recreation.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
